listing.optionIndependentDesc: Open an independent, private auction room for your products.
listing.independentInfoBody:
To open an independent auction:
1. You must accept the Independent Auction Pre-Contract from your profile.
2. Once your auction room is created, you must add at least 40 products to this room using the 'Auction Event' option.

Please contact admin/support to create your auction room.

settings.title: Settings
settings.legalPrivacyMeta: Data processing, retention, and user rights
settings.legalReturnMeta: Reverse logistics, approval, and payout flow
settings.legalAuctionTermsMeta: Auction rules, wallet holds, and bidding conditions
settings.thirdPartyDesc: Sharing your data with business partners
settings.required: This consent is required and cannot be withdrawn
settings.deleteWarning: Your account will be deleted and can be reactivated within 30 days. After this period, your data will be permanently anonymized.
settings.passwordRequired: You need to enter your password
settings.accountDeletedMessage: Your account has been deleted. You can reactivate it within 30 days.

privacy.title: Privacy and KVKK
privacy.summary: Endemigo processes the personal data required for account creation, ordering, payment, delivery, and support for specific operational purposes.

collection.title: Collected data
collection.body1: Identity, contact, delivery, payment reference, and order lifecycle data are stored to manage your account and transaction safety.
collection.body2: Marketing and third-party sharing preferences are evaluated only within the scope of the consent you provide.

processing.title: Processing purposes
processing.body1: Data is used for order creation, cargo tracking, return management, fraud prevention, and compliance with legal obligations.
processing.body2: Authorized teams can access records only within their responsibilities, and critical actions are monitored through audit logs.

retention.title: Retention and logs
retention.body1: Order and payment records are retained for financial and legal obligations, while support and operational logs are reviewed for service quality and security.
retention.body2: After the account reactivation grace period expires, personal data is anonymized or removed in line with the applicable policy and regulation.

distanceSales.title: Distance sales notice
distanceSales.summary: For platform orders, product details, total amount, delivery steps, and post-order support flow are presented clearly to the user.

scope.title: Agreement scope
scope.body1: When you place an order, the transaction is formed through the product listing, seller information, cargo flow, and payment summary.
scope.body2: After payment is secured, the order moves into seller operations and is completed after delivery confirmation.

delivery.title: Delivery and tracking
delivery.body1: The order detail screen shows cargo status, tracking number, and shipment history.
delivery.body2: Post-delivery confirmation, return requests, and refund steps are all tracked through the order status flow.

support.title: Support and records
support.body1: Critical order changes are delivered as notifications and the transaction trail is stored for audit purposes.
support.body2: When disputes or operational reviews are needed, these records can be referenced by admin review flows.

returnPolicy.title: Return and refund policy
returnPolicy.summary: For completed orders, the buyer can open a return request and the approval, reverse logistics, and refund stages are tracked within the platform flow.

eligibility.title: Return eligibility
eligibility.body1: A return request can be opened only for completed orders, and only one active return process is allowed per order.
eligibility.body2: While a return request is active, no new review can be submitted; once refunded, review stays permanently closed.

logistics.title: Reverse logistics
logistics.body1: When the seller approves the return request, a return shipment is created and its movement is shown in the order detail.
logistics.body2: Once the return reaches the seller, delivery is confirmed and the flow moves to the refund preparation stage.

refund.title: Refund flow
refund.body1: The refund starts after the returned shipment is delivered and is tracked as a payment-provider and order-status transition.
refund.body2: Risky or exceptional cases may be routed to admin review, and critical decisions are kept in the audit trail.

auctionTerms.title: Auction Terms & Conditions
auctionTerms.summary: Participation in multi-seller and themed auctions organized on our platform, bidding, wallet hold processes, and rules are subject to these terms.

general.title: General Rules
general.body1: Auctions are held as platform-organized themed events or individual lots.
general.body2: Bids placed by participants are legally binding and cannot be withdrawn. Extending the auction duration or changing the lot sequence is under admin control.

bidding.title: Bidding and Extensions
bidding.body1: Bids must comply with the minimum increment set for each lot. Bids placed in the final seconds will automatically extend the lot duration.
bidding.body2: Bidding sequence and active lot transitions are synchronized in real-time through the live interface.

wallet.title: Wallet Holds and Payments
wallet.body1: To participate and place bids, the estimated bid amount must be available in your wallet.
wallet.body2: When you hold the leading bid, the bid amount is blocked in your wallet. If won, payment is captured from the hold; if lost, the hold is released.

moderation.title: Live Moderation and Control
moderation.body1: The auction administrator can pause, resume, or skip to the next lot at any moment.
moderation.body2: Sale of cultural assets or registered geographical indication products is subject to special legal regulations and platform approval processes.
